top_signals.title: Oil Climbs, US Stock Futures Dip on Iran Strikes: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Oil rose and US equity-index futures fell after the US launched another round of strikes against Iran, while conflicting claims over the status of the Strait of Hormuz heightened uncertainty.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: U.S., Iran trade wave of strikes while disputing status of Hormuz
top_signals.summary: Donald Trump had ordered fresh strikes targeting Tehran's ability to attack commercial vessels after Iranian forces hit a Cyprus-flagged container ship.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Big private equity firms pull in more cash as winners take all
top_signals.summary: Shrinking pool of recipients points to coming wave of so-called zombie firms
